feed.title: GTFS Scorecard: feed quality changes
feed.subtitle: Transit agencies whose GTFS data quality grade or score moved since their last check.

entry.title: Washington Park Shuttle: grade improved F to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Washington Park Shuttle's GTFS data quality went from 56.9 (F) to 60.5 (D). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Via Mobility: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Via Mobility's GTFS data quality went from 70.8 (C) to 63.3 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Towson Loop: score fell 4.1 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Towson Loop's GTFS data quality went from 66.8 (D) to 62.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Springfield Mass Transit District (SMTD): score rose 4.0 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Springfield Mass Transit District (SMTD)'s GTFS data quality went from 55.8 (F) to 59.8 (F). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Flex: grade dropped B to C
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Flex's GTFS data quality went from 80.2 (B) to 79.8 (C). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Static feed for realtime: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Static feed for realtime's GTFS data quality went from 63.9 (D) to 59.7 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Rogue Valley Transportation District (RVTD): score fell 1.9 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Rogue Valley Transportation District (RVTD)'s GTFS data quality went from 68.4 (D) to 66.5 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Pasadena Transit: score fell 1.4 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-04, Pasadena Transit's GTFS data quality went from 83.1 (B) to 81.7 (B). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.
